introSection: Mammut (Italian for Mammoth) is a steel roller coaster located at Gardaland in Castelnuovo del Garda, Veneto, Italy. Opened in 2008, it is a custom mine train from Vekoma, as well as the third Vekoma roller coaster built at the park.
fullText: Mammut (Italian for Mammoth) is a steel roller coaster located at Gardaland in Castelnuovo del Garda, Veneto, Italy. Opened in 2008, it is a custom mine train from Vekoma, as well as the third Vekoma roller coaster built at the park.
